interpretation: Near-field is evaluated on integer depth bins without interpolation.
Higher-order corrections are tracked through forward differences of E_d and L_d.

hypothesis: Triplet-coherent motifs maintain higher triplet occupancy coherence and lower e000-axis leakage, while broken off-cycle motifs show higher e000 leakage, lower terminal non-e000 mass proxy, and lower transport proxy.
limits: Toy 4-node DAG probe, not full physical closure.
Observables are proxy metrics designed for falsifiable directionality tests.
Does not by itself select a unique continuum bridge law.

observables.C_t: mean triplet occupancy fraction across source/mediator/terminal nodes
observables.D_t: discrete graph-distance index from initial state (integer tick depth)
observables.L_d: distance-indexed leakage ladder value at discrete distance d
observables.M_t: terminal node non-e000 mass proxy (sum abs2 over channels 1..7)
